intro.title: Tools that can grow by editing one JSON file.
intro.body: Every app card is rendered from local structured data, making the platform easy to expand without touching page markup.

apps.name: Maths Glow
apps.description: A simple mathematics learning platform with formulas, concepts, and quick study support.

apps.name: Founder Kit
apps.description: A startup planning space for product ideas, milestones, and ecosystem notes.

apps.name: Dev Console
apps.description: A clean developer profile and skills surface for showcasing project capability.

apps.name: Offline Vault
apps.description: A PWA-ready content layer that keeps essential pages and JSON data available offline.

apps.name: Ecosystem Index
apps.description: A scalable catalog pattern for future products, tools, services, and internal utilities.

apps.name: Growth Pulse
apps.description: A conceptual business pulse panel for tracking initiatives and team focus areas.
